mapper.select: SELECT board_id, title FROM board WHERE board_id = #{board_id}
SELECT recipe_id, title AS report_title FROM recipe WHERE recipe_id = #{recipe_id}
SELECT review_id, title AS report_title FROM review WHERE review_id = #{review_id}
SELECT c.comment_id, c.content AS detail, m.nickname FROM comment c LEFT JOIN member m ON c.member_id = m.member_id WHERE c.comment_id = #{comment_id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO report ( target_type, reason, report_title, detail, status, created_date, member_id, board_id, comment_id, recipe_id, review_id ) VALUES ( #{target_type}, #{reason}, #{report_title}, #{detail}, '처리대기', NOW(), #{member_id}, #{board_id}, #{comment_id}, #{recipe_id}, #{review_id} )
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, m.name, m.nickname, m.email, m.profile_img FROM report r LEFT JOIN member m ON r.member_id = m.member_id ORDER BY r.report_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE report SET status = '경고처리', processed_date = NOW() WHERE report_id = #{report_id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report WHERE status = '처리대기' AND member_id = #{member_id} AND target_type = #{target_type} AND IFNULL(board_id, 0) = IFNULL(#{board_id}, 0) AND IFNULL(comment_id, 0) = IFNULL(#{comment_id}, 0) AND IFNULL(recipe_id, 0) = IFNULL(#{recipe_id}, 0) AND IFNULL(review_id, 0) = IFNULL(#{review_id}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE report SET status = '경고처리', processed_date = NOW() WHERE status = '처리대기' AND member_id = #{member_id} AND target_type = #{target_type} AND IFNULL(board_id, 0) = IFNULL(#{board_id}, 0) AND IFNULL(comment_id, 0) = IFNULL(#{comment_id}, 0) AND IFNULL(recipe_id, 0) = IFNULL(#{recipe_id}, 0) AND IFNULL(review_id, 0) = IFNULL(#{review_id}, 0)
